title: 2 reasons why Microsoft belongs in your portfolio: D.A. Davidson's Gil Luria
summary: D.A. Davidson's Gil Luria joins Yahoo Finance's Josh Lipton to explain why Microsoft (MSFT) is a top AI stock, arguing that its multi-year access to OpenAI’s technology and the rise of open-source models make owning a proprietary frontier model unnecessary.

title: Could AMD's new Helios AI rack system push it to outperform Nvidia?
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) unveiled its latest AI infrastructure product, the Helios rackscale systems for data centers. Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley outlines AMD's latest raft of microprocessors and other products that aim to put it in direct competition with chip competitor Nvidia (NVDA). AMD is currently scheduled to report second quarter earnings on Tuesday, August 4, well ahead of Nvidia's earnings release expected out on Wednesday, August 26.

title: If You'd Invested $10,000 in Ford Stock 10 Years Ago, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
summary: Shares have performed exceptionally well in the past 12 months, which is an aberration.

title: AI Chip Stocks Just Got Crushed. 3 Semiconductor ETFs to Buy the Dip On
summary: Semiconductor stocks just took a bruising, but the companies powering every major AI buildout are nowhere near done growing. Three ETFs offer very different ways to position for the rebound, and the choice you make now could matter a lot.

title: Ripple Just Solved RLUSD’s Two Biggest Problems With Ripple Mint and Notabene Deal
summary: Ripple just tackled the two friction points that keep institutions away from its stablecoin, but one of those fixes does far more for Ripple than it does for XRP holders.

title: Amkor Technology surges 16% on $1.5B Nvidia deal
summary: Investing.com -- Amkor Technology Inc (NASDAQ:AMKR) shares jumped 16.6% in after-hours trading Thursday following the announcement of a multi-year strategic partnership with NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) valued at $1.5 billion to develop advanced semiconductor packaging and test technologies for AI and accelerated computing platforms.

title: First Trust Launches DGJL, a New Buffer ETF With a Fixed 9.37% Return
summary: First Trust just launched a buffer ETF that promises a fixed return no matter how much the S&P 500 outperforms it, and that unusual tradeoff comes with a catch most investors overlook until it is too late.

title: Nvidia, Amkor strike $1.5 billion chip packaging deal
summary: Amkor Technology said on Thursday it had entered a multi-year agreement ‌with Nvidia worth $1.5 billion to expand ‌advanced semiconductor packaging and test capacity in the U.S., as ​the chip industry races to build out AI infrastructure.  • ⁠Under the agreement, Nvidia will make a prepayment to support the expansion ⁠of Amkor's U.S. advanced packaging operations, including capacity in Arizona.  • The companies will jointly develop ​packaging and ​testing technologies for Nvidia's ​AI and accelerated-computing ‌platforms, focusing on combining different types of chips in a single package.

title: These 3 Total Market ETFs Look Interchangeable but Picking the Wrong One Costs You Real Money Over a Lifetime
summary: VTI, ITOT, and SCHB all charge the same fee and post nearly identical annual returns, but one structural difference between them quietly drains compounded wealth across a 30-year holding period in a taxable account.

title: Nvidia's Stock Hasn't Been This Cheap Since 2019. Here's Why It's the Best Buy in the Market Now.
